title: Department of Parks to Restore Hanover Square Fountain
summary: The City of Syracuse Department of Parks will begin rehabilitating the historic Hanover Square Fountain starting June 16, 2025, through late fall 2025. The project includes restoration of the 1981 fountain structure, new lighting and mechanical infrastructure, enhanced landscaping, and accessibility improvements. This represents a capital investment in downtown revitalization and public space quality.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation & Youth Programs

political_signal.description: Downtown revitalization and public space investment aligned with mayoral priorities for cultural/architectural enhancement and resident quality of life.

processing_notes: No budget amount specified in release; recommend cross-reference with capital projects database for funding details.
